input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests exercise specialized JDK internals and SecurityManager behavior; the observed JDK 25 java-run failure appears test-code/version-compatibility related rather than missing setup.

If the generated fix keeps coverage for OGNL internals that reflect into JDK classes, local Gradle/Native Image verification remains authoritative for whether existing JVM args such as module opens are still needed.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process Java expression language; its only runtime dependency for 3.3.5 is transitive Javassist, and normal meaningful coverage is reachable with ordinary POJO expression get/set/parse/use cases without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
